response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience with a strong, recent track record in the exact primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, and React across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq. He explicitly works on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which directly matches a hard-to-find requirement. He has Java exposure, MongoDB/SQL, Docker/Kubernetes, and a documented testing/TDD discipline. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions and Kotlin is absent, but the foundation is more than strong enough to ramp on those quickly.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP development experience
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React delivery at senior+ level across multiple companies
Strong testing, TDD, and software-craftsmanship background with workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit Vitest experience (Jest/testing background present but framework not named)
Kotlin not mentioned; secondary JVM experience is Java and somewhat dated
